name: earlygrid-ringclear
desc: Let a real non-empty 0x0315 strategic cell-grid response advance the world-init walk. The original client leaves the pending-send ring non-empty after the 0x0315 parser, so LOGH_STRAT_GRID_EARLY stalls before 0x0f02. This same-length patch clears only the 0x0315 ring counter after staging copy and before RLE decode, allowing the real 0x0313/0x0315 galaxy grid to reach staging before FUN_004c5350 snapshots it into live tables.
verified: live marker-fix evidence: real early grid reaches 81 live markers without the 0x0314 stall

patches.note: FUN_004ba2b0 case 0x0315: force clientBase+0x357ec0=0 after 5004B staging copy and before FUN_004abbb0, preserving decode/tail flow; enables LOGH_STRAT_GRID_EARLY without the pending-ring stall.
